description:
Digitize the SOP found at '~/Documents/RIPA_Lysis_SOP.txt' into a SciNote protocol named 'RIPA Lysis Protocol'. Each numbered item in the source file must correspond to a separate protocol step, preserving the original order and content.

Login Credentials:

- Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming

expected_steps: Wash cells twice with cold PBS.
Add RIPA buffer (1 mL per 10cm dish).
Scrape cells and transfer to microcentrifuge tube.
